RemediationStrings.Title: **del.fUseMailto (Administrative Templates - Remote Desktop Services)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services\**del.fUseMailto must be . Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Remote Desktop Services.

RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\Terminal Services\fAllowToGetHelp must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Remote Desktop Services.
